summary: The Go test suite for the cli/cli repository failed on macOS with exit code 1. The log context shows only the tail of the test run — the packages visible have no test files — so the specific failing test and assertion are not present in the provided context.
root_cause: One or more Go tests failed during the test run, causing `go test` to exit with code 1 and print `FAIL`. The specific failing test and assertion are not visible in the provided log slice.

evidence.reason: The `go test` command printed FAIL as its final summary line, indicating at least one test in the suite did not pass.
The runner confirmed the process exited with a non-zero code, meaning the test binary reported failure.
The visible packages both carry [no test files], meaning the actual failing package and its test output are earlier in the log and not included in this context slice.

suggested_fix: Retrieve the full job log to identify which package and test function printed FAIL or a panic/assertion mismatch, then fix the failing assertion or the code under test.

model_info._backfill_note: Pre-Codex-2026-05-14 F2 fix. The Claude shim now persists _model_info from every API call; this row predates that emit so resolved_model and usage are not recoverable. requested_model is set to the shim-level alias (haiku for v1, sonnet for v2) which is what the post-fix shim emits.
